title: Seafood Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African stew made with a combination of seafood and spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger to the pot and cook until the onion is softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the frozen seafood mix to the pot and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Add 1 cup of water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the seafood is cooked through, about 10-12 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the seafood hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
